1.title: Requests
1.query:
timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.service }
| fieldsAdd service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 10

2.title: Response time - Median
2.query:
timeseries response_time = avg(dt.service.request.response_time, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.service }
| fieldsAdd service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort arrayAvg(response_time) desc
| limit 10

3.title: Response time - Slowest 10%
3.query:
timeseries response_time = avg(dt.service.request.response_time, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.service }
| fieldsAdd service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort arrayAvg(response_time) desc
| limit 10
